info.description: Improve transparency on your shop floor by recording and tracking attendance, labor, and production. Use the time tracking service to manage time tracking records and accurately record attendance, direct and indirect labor as well as production time and resource usage.
info.title: Time Tracking

regionHost.description: The data center where SAP Digital Manufacturing is provisioned for your organization.

tokenHost.description: The authentication server where SAP Digital Manufacturing is provisioned for your organization.

get.description: Find all time records using various filter parameters. (Note: By default the service doesn't return any deleted time records. However, you can use the 'status' parameter to retrieve deleted records.)

parameters.description: The plant of the user tracking the activity type
parameters.name: plant

parameters.description: The activity type of the time record
parameters.name: type

parameters.description: The ID of the user tracking the activity type
parameters.name: userId

parameters.description: The start date and time of the event
parameters.name: start

parameters.description: The end date and time of the event
parameters.name: end

parameters.description: The name of the resource
parameters.name: resource

parameters.description: The name of the work center
parameters.name: workCenter

parameters.description: The name of the operation activity
parameters.name: operation

parameters.description: The version of the operation activity
parameters.name: operationVersion

parameters.description: The ID of the activity
parameters.name: stepId

parameters.description: The number of the order
parameters.name: shopOrder

parameters.description: The number of the SFC
parameters.name: sfc

parameters.description: The status of the time record
parameters.name: status

parameters.description: The name of the routing
parameters.name: routing

parameters.description: The version of the routing
parameters.name: routingVersion

parameters.description: The type of the routing
parameters.name: routingType

parameters.description: The standard value against which labor is tracked. (Note: This parameter is ignored if 'activity' parameter is provided.)
parameters.name: standardValue

parameters.description: The activity recorded for the activity type
parameters.name: activity

parameters.description: Zero-based page index (0..N)
parameters.name: page

parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned
parameters.name: size

parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,asc/desc. The default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.
parameters.name: sort
